jobs.title: Operations Program Manager, Managed Operations
jobs.summary: Operations Program Manager responsible for building and scaling operational infrastructure to support product launches and ensuring high-quality customer outcomes at Stripe. The role involves leading cross-functional projects, developing procedures with customers, and managing operational performance across distributed teams.

jobs.title: Product Lead, AI
jobs.location: San Francisco, Seattle, New York, Chicago
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Stripe's Payments Intelligence platform, which uses ML to optimize payment transactions and minimize fraud. Partner with engineering, design, and data science to build features that help users maximize revenue while minimizing costs.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Banking as a Service
jobs.summary: Own core APIs, embedded experiences, and partner integrations for Stripe's Banking as a Service platform, building sophisticated financial services products with minimal operational complexity. Collaborate across engineering, design, legal, risk, and compliance teams while engaging deeply with customer stakeholders and developers to shape product strategy and deliver seamless experiences at scale.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Capital
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Stripe Capital's international expansion, serving as the mini-GM of the international lending business. Own the end-to-end roadmap, vision, and cross-functional team to build financing products across multiple countries.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
jobs.summary: Build and architect Stripe's unified commerce and billing infrastructure that serves as the revenue engine for all product teams. Lead the harmonization of disparate systems (billing, seller systems, financial data warehouses) to reduce friction and accelerate product velocity.

jobs.title: Product Manager, EMEA Payments Lead
jobs.summary: Lead EMEA payments product strategy and vision at Stripe, defining roadmaps across regional payment methods, conversion optimization, and market expansion. Drive end-to-end product ownership for payment infrastructure serving billions in monthly volume across one of the world's most complex payment ecosystems.

jobs.title: Product Manager IC-02
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy for Stripe's internal data infrastructure, reporting, and GenAI initiatives across multiple cross-functional teams. Drive platformization of reporting, semantic layer development, and technical feasibility analysis for global expansion.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Link Consumer Product
jobs.summary: Build the Link wallet app experience across web and native platforms, serving 200m+ consumers with world-class features for the future of payments and identity. Own core consumer features end-to-end while defining strategy and scaling new products alongside engineering, design, and GTM teams.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Local Payment Methods EMEA
jobs.summary: Own product strategy and roadmap for local payment methods in EMEA, managing relationships with major payment providers to drive billions in payment volume. Work with merchants, partners, and internal teams to prioritize investments that improve checkout conversion and payment performance.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Payments
jobs.summary: Product Manager for Stripe's Payments organization, responsible for developing products and platforms that enable businesses to accept payments efficiently across regions and payment types. You'll own critical pieces of the payments stack, define product strategy, and ship products that directly impact Stripe's revenue and merchant success.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Payments Intelligence
jobs.summary: Product Manager responsible for developing strategy and building features for Stripe's Payments Intelligence products that help users maximize revenue while minimizing costs and fraud. You'll work with engineers, data scientists, and cross-functional partners to own the vision and execution of payment optimization capabilities.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Risk & Compliance
jobs.summary: Product Manager for Risk & Compliance at Stripe, focusing on post-onboarding risk user experiences and identity verification. Drive strategy and roadmap for compliance journeys across Stripe's verification platform serving millions of businesses globally.

jobs.title: Product Manager, SEA
jobs.summary: Own Stripe's product strategy and execution for Southeast Asia, localizing core payment products and building new capabilities for the region's dynamic markets. Work across engineering, design, and go-to-market teams to identify high-leverage opportunities and navigate regional regulatory constraints.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Stripe Infrastructure
jobs.summary: Product Manager for Stripe's infrastructure and data systems team, responsible for partnering with engineering leaders to build reliable, scalable infrastructure that powers Stripe's financial platform and serves both internal and external users. The role focuses on developer experience, system design principles, and architectural decisions that balance business impact with engineering efficiency.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Support Products - Support Experience
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy for Consumer Support at Stripe, focusing on improving product quality and enabling users to self-solve issues through scalable support systems. Partner with cross-functional teams to build data-driven flywheels that reduce support volume and enhance customer experience.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Terminal Device Expansion
jobs.summary: Lead product strategy and execution for Stripe Terminal's device software platform, defining multi-year vision and roadmaps for in-person payment devices. Partner with hardware and software engineering teams to build scalable, reliable, and differentiated device software capabilities.

jobs.title: Product Manager, Terminal - Unified Commerce
jobs.summary: Lead the development of Stripe's unified commerce platform for enterprise customers, owning the end-to-end product vision and strategy for in-person payments combined with cross-border payments, fraud protection, and AI-powered optimizations. Set multi-year vision, establish roadmaps and OKRs, and collaborate across internal teams and external users to drive adoption of Terminal's enterprise offerings.

jobs.title: Program Manager, Business Practices
jobs.summary: Program Manager responsible for building and scaling deal lifecycle transformation programs across Stripe's global go-to-market organization. The role involves designing policies, processes, and operational models to improve deal quality and velocity while managing complex cross-functional stakeholder relationships.

jobs.title: Program Manager, Intake & Portfolio Management
jobs.summary: Own Stripe's intake and prioritization process for the People Operations team, serving as the connective tissue between People team requests and the POI organization's capacity across four core teams. Build and manage end-to-end intake systems, triage processes, and facilitate strategic prioritization conversations to ensure high-impact work is delivered.

jobs.title: Program Manager, Risk Ops Enablement
jobs.summary: Lead complex, cross-functional programs within Risk Operations to improve operational processes and user experience while preventing fraud at Stripe. jobs.title: Regulatory Reporting Program Manager, Stablecoin
jobs.summary: Lead Stripe's U.S. regulatory reporting program for stablecoins and digital assets, managing end-to-end processes from requirement interpretation to report production and compliance monitoring.
